webhookUrl.description: Target URL. MUST be HTTP or HTTPS. Private/reserved IPv4 ranges (localhost, 127/8, 10/8, 192.168/16, link-local 169.254.169.254) are rejected (SSRF defense).

webhookSecret.description: HMAC-SHA256 key. The signature header is `X-MyndHyve-Signature: hex(hmac-sha256(secret, body))`. Empty secret yields an empty-key signature (still computed).

webhookHeaders.description: Extra request headers. Merged AFTER the executor's defaults so callers can override Content-Type if needed.

webhookBody.description: Custom payload data. Merged into the envelope at `stepData` when present.
